mapper.sql: id, username, password_hash, email, role_code, status, last_login_at, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM app_user ORDER BY
lower(username)
CASE role_code WHEN 'SUPER_ADMIN' THEN 1 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 2 WHEN 'USER' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
lower(email) status created_at
ASC DESC
NULLS LAST, id LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM app_user WHERE lower(username) = lower(#{username})
AND id != #{excludeUserId,jdbcType=OTHER}

SELECT count(*) FROM app_user WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND lower(email) = lower(#{email})
AND id != #{excludeUserId,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.update:
UPDATE app_user
username = #{username}, email = #{email}, role_code = #{roleCode}, status = #{status}, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND status != 'DELETED'

UPDATE app_user SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = now(), deleted_by = #{operatorId,jdbcType=OTHER}, delete_reason = #{reason}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{userId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND status != 'DELETED'
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM app_user WHERE role_code = 'SUPER_ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id FOR UPDATE
